message:
fix(sync): respect dolt-native mode in daemon_sync_branch.go (bd-ats9.3.1)

Add ShouldExportJSONL() checks to syncBranchCommitAndPushWithOptions and
syncBranchPull functions. In dolt-native mode, these functions now return
early (true, nil) to skip JSONL operations since Dolt handles sync through
its own Push/Pull methods.
